languages.text: "Мне понадобится командующий зарковскими войсками. И место архмилитанта как раз свободно".
"I shall need a commander for the Zarkovian troops. And the position of Arch-Militant also happens to be open."
languages.original_text: "Мне понадобится командующий зарковскими войсками. И место архмилитанта как раз свободно".

traits.locale_text: "I shall need a commander for the Zarkov troops. And the position of Arch-Militant also happens to be open."
"I shall need a commander for the Zarkovian troops. And the position of Arch-Militant also happens to be open."
"I shall need a commander for the detached troops. And the position of Arch-Militant also happens to be open."
"I shall need a commander for the Zarkov troops. And the position of Arch-Militant also happens to be open."
"I shall need a commander for the Zarkovian troops. And the position of Arch-Militant also happens to be open."

languages.text: 「分遣隊には指揮官が必要だ。それに、アーク・ミリタントの席もちょうど空いている」
languages.original_text: "I shall need a commander for the detached troops. And the position of Arch-Militant also happens to be open."

traits.locale_text: 「分遣隊には指揮官が必要だ。それに、アーク・ミリタントの席もちょうど空いている。」

languages.text: « Les troupes zarkoviennes auront besoin d'un commandant, et il se trouve que le poste d'archimilitant est également à pourvoir. »
languages.original_text: "I shall need a commander for the Zarkovian troops. And the position of Arch-Militant also happens to be open."

traits.locale_text: « Les troupes zarkoviennes auront besoin d'un commandant, et il se trouve que le poste d'archimilitant est également à pourvoir. »

languages.text: "Zarkov birliklerini idare edecek bir komutana ihtiyacım olacak. Başmilitanlık mevkisi de şu anda boş."
languages.original_text: "I shall need a commander for the Zarkovian troops. And the position of Arch-Militant also happens to be open."

traits.locale_text: "Zarkov birliklerini idare edecek bir komutana ihtiyacım olacak. Başmilitanlık mevkisi de şu anda boş."

languages.text: "Ich werde für die zarkovianischen Truppen einen Kommandeur brauchen. Außerdem ist die Position des Erzmilitanten derzeit nicht besetzt."
languages.original_text: "I shall need a commander for the Zarkovian troops. And the position of Arch-Militant also happens to be open."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde für die zarkovianischen Truppen einen Kommandeur brauchen. Außerdem ist die Position des Erzmilitanten derzeit nicht besetzt."

languages.text: «Necesitaré un comandante para las tropas de Zarkov. El puesto de Archimilitante también parece estar vacante».
languages.original_text: "I shall need a commander for the Zarkovian troops. And the position of Arch-Militant also happens to be open."

traits.locale_text: «Necesitaré un comandante para las tropas de Zarkov. El puesto de Archimilitante también parece estar vacante».

languages.text: “我需要一名指挥官来统率扎尔科夫的部队。而且，首席战士一职也正好空缺。”
languages.original_text: "I shall need a commander for the Zarkovian troops. And the position of Arch-Militant also happens to be open."

traits.locale_text: “我需要一名指挥官来统率扎尔科夫的部队。而且，首席战士一职也正好空缺。”
